name: block
description: Whole-block visualization — draws blocks (and their outer zone faces) with field contouring and categorical labelling. 'plot item create blockface' shares the same keyword set but draws individual block faces. For the continuum field inside deformable blocks use 'bzone'.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Clip the item against the global model clip box.
Colour entities by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute. See sub-item 'contour'.
Apply a 3D cutting plane to the item.
Categorical colour/label entities (group, model, state, id, ...). See sub-item 'label'.
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Draw filled polygons (faces) rather than wireframe.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: contour
sub_items.description: Colour blocks by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute (stress, displacement, ...).

sub_items.name: label
sub_items.description: Categorical colour blocks by group, model, state, id, jointset, ...

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create block label group-block legend active on
plot item create block contour displacement legend active on
plot item create block contour stress-zz legend active on
plot item create block label state legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Highlight plastic / yielded zones by state.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against 3DEC 9.0.
